The '''Firestorm-1''' was a personal mini-[[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launcher]] manufactured by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]. Firestorm-1's basic package allowed for an internal magazine of three dumb fired explosive [[Missile/Legends|missiles]]. The [[Fireball missile package]] upgraded the missiles to have guidance systems and were capable of locking onto targets, with an effective kill zone of 12 meters, an effective range of 40-120 meters, and a maximum range of 400 meters. The system was attachable to personal [[battle armor]], and cost around 1,500 credits.
